creator: sol289@gmail.com
text:
It's a motherboard support report for project amd64. We have Supermicro 6025B-TR+B server with motherboard X7DBE+, http://www.supermicro.com/products/motherboard/Xeon1333/5000P/X7DBE+.cfm. It is a mail server with ZFS RAIDZ storage pool of 5 SATA disks (1 SATA is boot disk and not in pool). For now only network peripherals has been tested, and everything is working fine.  

Dmesg:

FreeBSD is a registered trademark of The FreeBSD Foundation.
